human_verification.notes: Verified financial-services-specific boundary handling, research source-class coverage, metric-definition and reconciliation controls, unsupported-override refusal, and scenario-to-ability mapping completeness.

review_notes: All 12 scenarios pass with explicit metric-definition, posting-support, reconciliation, unsupported-override, and escalation behavior.
Required shared, analytics-reporting-and-disclosure, and financial-services-and-insurance abilities are fully covered and mapped.

specialist_owned_evidence: Metric-definition logic is explicit and tied to named account, policy, claim, payment, dispute, servicing, and ledger source records.
Conflicting, stale, incomplete, or unsupported source data is escalated instead of normalized into unsupported reporting or financial treatment.
Fraud, AML, consumer-impact, legal-interpretation, claim-adjudication, underwriting, and accounting boundaries route to adjacent owners with structured evidence.
Runtime remains `specification-based`, with no retained-implementation claim embedded in this package.
notes: No blocking unresolved ambiguity remains; state-specific insurance adoption and tenant accounting policy are captured as required runtime context rather than guessed in-pack.
Pack is ready for validated specification-based deployment with explicit promotion criteria for a future retained-implementation package.
